title: justicia ramamurthyi
intro: Justicia ramamurthyi, a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family, is a rare and endemic plant found in the Western Ghats of India. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Justicia ramamurthyi include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin disorders, and respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by extracting its leaves and roots, which are often used in traditional medicine to prepare decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its therapeutic benefits.
